ApplicationPackage.Name: G.plus
ApplicationPackage.Description: Smarter Data Management & Visualization : G.plus is a G.algos add-in for Autodesk® Revit® that enhances data control, clarity, and collaboration. It bridges the gap between modeling and documentation.
ApplicationPackage.Author: G.algos

ComponentEntry.AppDescription: Smarter Data Management & Visualization : G.plus is a G.algos add-in for Autodesk® Revit® that enhances data control, clarity, and collaboration. It bridges the gap between modeling and documentation.
